case_title: S AND C MOTORS INC VS AUTO SHEET METAL

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO SHEET METAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,035.29 FILED BY S AND C MOTORS INC AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO SHEET METAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S AND C MOTORS INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTO SHEET METAL $1,035.29 PRINCIPAL, $38.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,073.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO SHEET METAL
